what: DECLARED (immutable) candidate space for the owned-oracle reconstruction loop: axes x values + baseline best-stack. Each axis declares which NAMED owned-vs-generated delta it targets (bench/qk-search-spaces/owned_delta_taxonomy.json). Outcomes live in a SEPARATE append-only ledger (bench/qk-pure-search-loop/decode_attention_loop_ledger.jsonl). The generator (extra/qk_pure_search_next_candidate.py) is the SINGLE source of truth for candidate selection.
active_space: one-factor singles (axis x value) PLUS pairs of cheap knobs (pairs ON by default). SEARCH_SPACE_EXHAUSTED => every single AND pair is in the ledger.
owned_oracle: the owned AMDGCN decode-attention tile. Every candidate targets a named delta; if candidates do not MOVE the named delta, classify SEARCH_SPACE_BUG (not 'try more'). PROMOTABLE requires W==D + token-match.

axes.hypothesis: memory-coalescing trigger on the LDS K/V staging load; does NOT target the open outer_b slope -> expect no slope movement (a SEARCH_SPACE_BUG smell for the slope)
dependency-chain/ILP trigger -- but unroll reaches the INNER tt-carry, not the outer b-carry that is the ctx-slope; proven not to move the slope delta
cross-lane vs waitcnt trigger; cross_lane is already at owned per-token parity (truth #4) -> not the open delta
directly targets the open slope delta via independent b-partitions; K=2 refuted (occupancy tax), K=4 degenerate

the 'more workgroups' (Level-2) lever targeting the combine/lifecycle delta: higher split count S -> more workgroups (S=48 gives 384 wg). Its cost is the split-KV COMBINE tax, IN-MODEL only -> isolated MISLEADS; W==D-gated. Predicted combine-economics-capped but untried for the generated tile.
axes.added_by: Z (loop self-improvement 2026-06-27): knob space exhausted; topology + W==D gate added

ledger: MOVED -> bench/qk-pure-search-loop/decode_attention_loop_ledger.jsonl (append-only JSONL; the generator reads it to prune)
